_readme: agent-roundtable model registry — minimal template + pre-researched entries.
Workflow:
1. `scripts/backend.sh init` copies this file to models.json (chmod 600, gitignored)
AND models.secrets.example.json to models.secrets.json (chmod 600, gitignored).
2. Open models.secrets.json — for each model you want to use, add an entry like
`"<model_id>": { "api_key": "sk-..." }` keyed by the EXACT model_id you'll
activate (e.g. "gpt-5.5" or "claude-4.7-opus"). Set models.json `active.codex`
and/or `active.claude` to that same model id.
3. `scripts/backend.sh apply` joins models.json + models.secrets.json by model_id
and writes .codex_env.local / .claude_env.local.
Three classes of entries are shipped below:
A. cursor-* entries — auth via Cursor IDE, no key required, ready to dispatch.
B. BYOK pre-researched entries (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.3-codex, claude-4.7-opus,
claude-4.6-sonnet) — capabilities (context window, benchmarks, cli_arg) filled
from upstream docs. You add the api_key in models.secrets.json, NOT here.
Pricing carries an _as_of date; see PRICING FRESHNESS below.
C. _template — generic placeholder for any other endpoint (custom proxy, vLLM, …).
Rename the key (entries starting with `_` are skipped by `apply`).
PRICING FRESHNESS CONTRACT:
Capability fields (context_window_k, benchmarks, cli_arg) are stable post-release.
Prices are NOT — vendors adjust list rates, proxies re-mark, plan tiers shift,
contracts negotiate. The shipped pricing is a SNAPSHOT, not authoritative.
Every `pricing` block carries `_as_of` (YYYY-MM-DD). Convention for the chat parent:
- if pricing is null OR `_as_of` is missing  → WebSearch and fill before dispatch.
- if `_as_of` is older than 30 days          → WebSearch and refresh, or ask user.
- if user pinned a price with `_pinned: true` → never auto-refresh.
- if `endpoint.base_url` points to a proxy   → ALWAYS re-research (proxy pricing
diverges 10-100x from vendor list, e.g. cialloapi GPT-5.5 is ~70x cheaper).
Or simply: ask the user to provide current pricing for cost-sensitive routing.
SECRETS LIVE IN models.secrets.json (chmod 600, gitignored), KEYED BY model_id.
models.json (this template's clone) holds NO api_key — it's read into prompts and
would otherwise leak. Joined at apply-time only. See models.secrets.example.json.

network_proxy._doc: Optional HTTP proxy for codex/claude actor dispatches (smoke test, validate, codex_turn.sh, claude_turn.sh). cursor-subagent path is NOT affected — Cursor IDE manages its own network. See docs/network-proxy.md for full schema.

_template._status: Generic placeholder. Rename key (e.g. to `my-vllm-llama4`), pick actor=codex|claude, fill cli_arg + endpoint.base_url, then add api_key under the SAME key in models.secrets.json. Entries whose key starts with `_` are skipped by `apply`.

endpoint._claude_shim_doc: If actor=claude on an Anthropic-compat shim, also set opus_model, sonnet_model, haiku_model, and (optional) claude_effort_level.

gpt-5.5._status: Pre-researched OpenAI direct. Add api_key in models.secrets.json keyed by this model_id. Swap base_url to a discount proxy (cialloapi, openrouter, …) if you don't have direct OpenAI access — the agent will re-research proxy pricing before apply.
gpt-5.5.underlying: OpenAI GPT-5.5 (Apr 2026 flagship, tuned for autonomous agentic workflows)

pricing._status: Snapshot from vendor list price; if you use a proxy or have negotiated rates this is wrong. Set _pinned: true after manual fill, otherwise the chat parent will re-research before dispatch.

gpt-5.3-codex._status: Pre-researched OpenAI direct. Codex-tuned variant — cheaper and explicitly optimized for terminal/agent tasks.
gpt-5.3-codex.underlying: OpenAI GPT-5.3-Codex (Feb 2026, optimized for agentic coding execution)

pricing._status: Snapshot from vendor list price; if you use a proxy or have negotiated rates this is wrong. Set _pinned: true after manual fill, otherwise the chat parent will re-research before dispatch.

claude-4.7-opus._status: Pre-researched Anthropic direct. Anthropic Apr 2026 flagship. Add api_key in models.secrets.json keyed by this model_id. For an Anthropic-compat shim (DeepSeek-compat, Bedrock-compat) swap base_url and add opus_model/sonnet_model/haiku_model/claude_effort_level.
claude-4.7-opus.underlying: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 (Apr 16, 2026; SWE-Pro leader, self-verifying execution)

pricing._status: Snapshot from vendor list price; if you use a proxy or have negotiated rates this is wrong. Set _pinned: true after manual fill, otherwise the chat parent will re-research before dispatch.

claude-4.6-sonnet._status: Pre-researched Anthropic direct. Workhorse Sonnet — Opus-tier on many tasks at Sonnet pricing. Add api_key in models.secrets.json keyed by this model_id.
claude-4.6-sonnet.underlying: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17, 2026; near-Opus performance at Sonnet pricing)

pricing._status: Snapshot from vendor list price; if you use a proxy or have negotiated rates this is wrong. Set _pinned: true after manual fill, otherwise the chat parent will re-research before dispatch.

cursor-composer-2.underlying: Cursor Composer 2 (frontier-tier coding model trained for agentic SWE; self-summarization for long-horizon tasks) via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)
cursor-composer-2.latency_warning: Pool-dependent, unbounded queue stalls observed (16 min). No --timeout-s.

cursor-claude-4.7-opus.underlying: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 (Apr 16, 2026) via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)

cursor-claude-4.6-sonnet.underlying: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17, 2026) via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)

cursor-gemini-3.1-pro.underlying: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro (Feb 2026; ARC-AGI-2 leader, deep thinking modes) via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)

_role_defaults_note: Cheap-first: bulk work (executor, reviewer fan-out, triage, compaction) uses cheapest capable model. reviewer-aggregator is the only role that defaults to the expensive cursor-claude-4.7-opus — it synthesizes N parallel reviewer verdicts into one canonical judgment. Cross-vendor fan-out (composer-2 + gemini + sonnet) costs ~same as one cursor-claude-4.7-opus turn but delivers cross-vendor diversity. When you import BYOK models, the chat parent adds them to appropriate tiers.
